title: Upgrading Windows nodes — Upgrade the kubelet configuration
text:
From the Windows node, call the following command to sync new kubelet configuration:
kubeadm
upgrade
node
From the Windows node, call the following command to sync new kubelet configuration:
kubeadm
upgrade
node
